content_body:
There are countless ways to spend time with your special someone and so many different types of charming, couple vacations, it would make your head spin like the first date all over again! The unique thing about choosing a luxury cabin in Georgia as your romantic getaway this year is: well, every aspect. 

Our romantic cabin rentals in the North Georgia mountains have a magical way of transporting you into another world. The soft, amorous atmosphere of the North Georgia mountains is enough to keep anyone in a constant state of bliss and contentment. Picture a diamond spattering of stars in the clear night sky. Imagine basking in the glow of romance and firelight without a single care in the world. 

Below is a list of five most romantic luxury Blue Ridge cabins you can find in Blue Ridge, Georgia. Once you experience one of these luxury cabins you won’t be able to deny the compelling utopia everyone keeps talking about. 

 

1. Sunsets in Blue Ridge, GA ~ Cohutta Sunset

When someone says “sunset” what do you think of? Is it a majestic explosion of pink, purple, gold, orange, and almost every color in between? Like most people with a yearning for romance, you probably equate sunsets with happy endings. Lucky for you, a romance novel-like sunset is just within your grasp. 

Here, nestled atop the wild, Cohutta Mountains is the secluded and luxurious Cohutta Sunset Cabin. With fine, gorgeous furnishings and a fully equipped kitchen, three king bedrooms with en-suite bathrooms to choose from, you are in control of your perfect, romantic, luxury cabin rental experience. Unwind and refresh yourself in the eye-catching waterfall rock shower just off the king suite on the main level.

From the hot tub picturesquely located directly in front of a crackling fireplace to a pool table on the terrace level, you will fill every moment with memories.  

With a brand-new set of colors blasting across the evening sky each evening, you couldn’t ask for a more romantic or artistically inspiring getaway. Grab your paintbrush, sketchbook, or even camera and hurry to capture the all too quickly fading masterpieces almost within arm’s reach.

2. Blue Ridge Cabins with Hot Tubs ~ The Rivers Edge

Nothing says romance quite like a firelit soak in a steamy hot tub overlooking the mighty waters of the Toccoa River. A lovely image, no? Well such a scene actually exists. Experiencing this North Georgia cabin rental will only add to the simultaneous feelings of excitement, love, and tranquility. There are plenty of romantic moments to experience at The Rivers Edge, and this is just one of them. 

Located nearly on top of the Toccoa River and the Cherokee Indian Fish Trap, this particular Blue Ridge luxury cabin rental is perfect for those seeking some river fun! Take a little hike downhill to explore the grounds along the Toccoa River. Wave to the Blue Ridge Scenic Railway as it passes by ever so slowly as passengers marvel at the natural beauty along the river.  Spend some time curled up reading with the library of books provided, or dine alfresco in front of a cozy fire table overlooking the beautiful Toccoa River. 

One, or two can never tire of the rumbling, tumbling Toccoa River views, visible from all three porches on each level. Whether it’s tubing you adore, the idea of a satisfying day fishing together, or a romantic canoe ride, a riverfront cabin is always a good idea. 

3. Romantic Blue Ridge Cabins ~ Cherokee Sunrise on Noontootla Creek 

Trying to find the perfect romantic place for a mountain getaway can be unnecessarily stressful. Making sure you and your partner will have every amenity you need for optimal relaxation and satisfaction shouldn’t be a struggle. A cozy refurbished 100+ year old farmhouse sitting on 30 acres in the Aska Adventure Area, Cherokee Sunrise on Noontootla Creek, which has absolutely everything you’re looking for in a romantic Blue Ridge cabin. 

With scenic seclusion and sublime creekside strolling, it is all too easy to lose yourself as if in another land. Once a Cherokee Indian reservation compound, get lost in the history of the area. A beautifully appointed cozy cabin outfitted in Restoration Hardware furniture and accessories, Cherokee Sunrise on Noontootla Creek invites you to prepare a romantic dinner and enjoy your meal at the rustic dining table or dine alfresco in front of the pond and fire pit. Not a single moment of romance can be lost with the coziness of the pot belly stove in the living room for a warm fire to truly set the mood. 

Take your sweet party of two out to the screened-in porch overlooking the vastness of the land and a beautiful peaceful pond where you will find a cozy fire table with comfortable seating and a SmartTV. The night sky has never been more alluring than when you’re sitting outside in front of the fire pit roasting marshmallows and s'mores, rekindling the flames of romance under a canopy of stars.

Feeling a part of the past at Cherokee Sunrise will help you find that ultimate escape with your loved one and experience romance of a different kind. 

4. Adventure and Romance in Blue Ridge ~ Aska Escape Lodge

If you’re the couple that craves adventure and excitement wherever you go, then Aska Escape Lodge has you covered! Whether daring feats are what keep the romance alive or you’re simply craving a bit of fresh air and exhilaration, this beautiful mountain and river view Blue Ridge cabin is an essential consideration. With access to nearly every exciting mountain activity you can imagine doing together, choose the waterfall hike nearby or spend the day tubing in the Toccoa River!

An uncommon combination of privacy and zero chance of missing out on all of the fun, outdoor activities in the Aska Adventure Area abound, and this spacious yet cozy luxury cabin rental does not disappoint. After an exciting day filled with fishing, kayaking, invigorating hikes, or tubing, a cleansing rinse in a spa-like jetted tub will do wonders to relax you enough for a full night’s sleep.

If you’re with someone who prefers the majority of their adventure be spent lost in the captivating world of words, there is a modestly extensive book library available on the terrace level. Packed with things to do all year around and wonderful for any occasion, Aska Escape Lodge has something for everyone and is very keen on the adventure that is romance. 

 

5. Waterfacing Blue Ridge Cabins ~ Blue Ridge Lake Sanctuary

Nature and serenity most definitely inspire romance. Those things inspired the location and atmosphere for our comfy, cozy, open floor plan called Blue Ridge Lake Sanctuary. A lavish Blue Ridge cabin facing Lake Blue Ridge with high ceilings and countless windows to let in that natural light and open up the unparalleled views makes for an ideal waterview cabin.

A lakeview cabin all but paints the picture of romance, but when paired with every luxurious amenity you could want, it becomes extremely hard to resist. Everyone sighs wistfully at the thought of soft, romantic banter in front of a fire’s glow and a half empty bottle of wine, and with three fireplaces to choose from, this dream can become a reality! With large TVs, one in practically every room, make it easy to curl up anywhere and watch your favorite movies together. 

Even with three bedrooms to choose from, it might be an effortless decision for some to go straight for the main floor king master suite. Love and romance will have another meaning after your luxury cabin rental vacation here! 

 

Any of these luxury vacation cabins in the Blue Ridge mountains are an excellent choice for a romantic getaway. All of our North Georgia cabin rentals radiate comfort and luxury with exquisite furnishings to lounge in and top-quality bedding to sink into every night and sleep away your troubles.

The gas grills, high-speed internet, fully equipped kitchens, roomy hot tubs, and numerous stone fireplaces are just the basics when it comes to renting one of our luxury Blue Ridge cabins. With an option for each and every aesthetic, it’s almost impossible to have a reason to miss out on such a thrilling, intimate experience as a couple.

If the idea of being curled up together on a sumptuous, leather couch with books and cocoa doesn’t mesmerize you, then perhaps laying back in a sizzling hot tub together with enough wine to last the entire night will. These are the things that keep couples coming back to our Blue Ridge luxury cabin rentals time and again.
title: 5 Romantic Blue Ridge Cabins
